metadata.description: Unified output schema for the ADA Decision Engine. Covers all eight top-level summary output fields produced by the wrapper, plus the module_outputs container holding full module detail for API callers who need it.

ada_covered.name: ada_covered
ada_covered.description: Whether both the employer and the individual meet ADA Title I coverage requirements. True if and only if is_covered_employer = true AND is_covered_individual = true. A false value causes all downstream analyses to short-circuit; downstream summary fields will reflect the absence of coverage.

has_qualifying_disability.name: has_qualifying_disability
has_qualifying_disability.description: Whether the individual has a qualifying disability under the ADA. Pass-through from Module 1 component 1.3 disability_determination output. 'indeterminate' is propagated through the summary and contributes to indeterminate_factors.

is_qualified_individual.name: is_qualified_individual
is_qualified_individual.description: Final composite determination of whether the individual is a qualified individual with a disability. Computed by wrapper rules WR-1 through WR-5 after Module 2 completes. Distinct from Module 1's preliminary is_qualified_individual output. This is the authoritative value for qualified individual status.
is_qualified_individual.derivation: Composite per WR-1 through WR-5; see logic/unified_logic.json for full rule conditions

accommodation_required.name: accommodation_required
accommodation_required.description: Whether a reasonable accommodation must be provided. Pass-through from Module 2 component 2.4 accommodation_determination output. 'indeterminate' reflects genuinely uncertain upstream facts and is propagated to indeterminate_factors.

employer_compliance_status.name: employer_compliance_status
employer_compliance_status.description: Composite employer compliance status across Module 3 components: interactive process, medical inquiry, and confidentiality. Three conditions evaluated: (1) interactive_process_compliant = yes AND (2) inquiry_permitted = yes for all stages evaluated AND (3) confidentiality_compliant = yes → 'compliant'. Any component producing 'no' → 'non_compliant'. No component produces 'no' but at least one produces 'indeterminate' → 'indeterminate'.

derivation.compliant: interactive_process_compliant = yes AND inquiry_permitted = yes (all stages evaluated) AND confidentiality_compliant = yes
derivation.non_compliant: interactive_process_compliant = no OR inquiry_permitted = no (any stage evaluated) OR confidentiality_compliant = no
derivation.indeterminate: no component produces no AND at least one of interactive_process_compliant OR inquiry_permitted OR confidentiality_compliant produces indeterminate

violation_risk_level.name: violation_risk_level
violation_risk_level.description: Overall employer violation risk level. Pass-through from Module 4 component 4.5 overall_violation_risk output field overall_risk_level. Represents the maximum risk level across all four claim types (failure to accommodate, disability discrimination, harassment, retaliation) with tiebreak applied.

recommended_actions.name: recommended_actions
recommended_actions.description: Ordered list of recommended employer actions based on all claim type findings. Pass-through from Module 4 component 4.5 overall_violation_risk output. Empty array if no recommendations are generated.

indeterminate_factors.name: indeterminate_factors
indeterminate_factors.description: Aggregated collection of all key_uncertainties arrays from every module component that produced an 'indeterminate' determination. Empty object {} if no indeterminate determinations exist across any module.
indeterminate_factors.value_description: The key_uncertainties array produced by the component when its determination was indeterminate. Each string identifies a specific unresolved factual or legal question preventing a definitive determination.
indeterminate_factors.derivation: For each module component that produced an indeterminate determination, collect its key_uncertainties array. Key is '{module_id}.{component_id}'. Value is the component's key_uncertainties array. Omit components that did not produce indeterminate.

ada_coverage_eligibility.disability_dete: Impairment duration uncertain — condition may be transitory
Medical documentation not sufficient to confirm substantial limitation
ada_employer_obligations.interactive_pro: Process quality disputed — employer and employee accounts conflict on whether employer proposed alternative accommodations

module_outputs.name: module_outputs
module_outputs.description: Full structured output from each module, keyed by module ID. For API callers who need detail beyond the eight summary fields. Each value is the complete module output object as defined in the respective module's output schema.

ada_coverage_eligibility.description: Full output from Module 1. Includes employer_coverage, individual_status, disability_determination, and qualified_individual component outputs.

ada_accommodation_analysis.description: Full output from Module 2. Includes accommodation_request, undue_hardship_analysis, direct_threat_analysis, and accommodation_determination component outputs.

ada_employer_obligations.description: Full output from Module 3. Includes interactive_process, medical_inquiry_limitations, and confidentiality component outputs.

ada_violation_risk.description: Full output from Module 4. Includes failure_to_accommodate, disability_discrimination, harassment, retaliation, and overall_violation_risk component outputs.
